#  Finance 
  * [ Capabilities ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/finance#anc01)
  * [ Insights ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/finance#anc02)
  * [ Customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/industries/finance#anc03)


The financial sector is entering a new era shaped by digital competition, shifting markets, and new AI‑driven expectations. Fujitsu supports this evolution with human‑centric digital transformation that enhances today’s operations and builds smarter, future‑ready customer experiences.
## Capabilities
Digital Transformation & Innovation
We accelerate digital transformation for financial institutions by applying cloud modernization, data‑driven insights, and innovative digital technologies. These initiatives help organizations streamline operations, improve customer experiences, and build new digital‑first business models.
Digital Banking
We deliver next‑generation digital banking capabilities that modernize customer journeys, transform branch and sales operations, and support omni‑channel banking experiences. Advanced technologies help banks accelerate innovation and improve service quality.
FinOps
FinOps services optimize cloud spending by improving financial visibility, strengthening governance, and enabling organizations to make smarter, data‑driven cloud investment decisions. The approach maximizes the value of cloud environments while reducing operational waste.
Payment Solutions
Our payment solutions enable secure, compliant, and frictionless digital transactions. Designed to support modernization, they help financial organizations enhance payment efficiency and scale with emerging customer needs.
Insurance Operations
Insurance operations are enhanced through automation, AI insights, and modern digital workflows that reduce complexity and improve process efficiency. These capabilities support faster claims handling, better risk assessment, and stronger customer service.
## Insights
**Financial Services DX2.0: A Future Strategy Co-Created with AI Agents**
The financial industry faces structural changes where past digital transformation (DX1.0) has reached its limits, often resulting in only partial efficiency gains. This article proposes the next evolutionary stage: "Financial Services DX2.0."
[ Learn more about AI agents in finance ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-financial-services-with-ai-agents-20250820)
![Two curved blue glass buildings against a clear blue sky, showcasing futuristic architectural design.](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/insight/tl-financial-services-with-ai-agents-20250820/kv-financial-services-with-ai-agents-936x578.jpg?h=578&iar=0&w=936&rev=08c0b73f013a4e56baf94ed775f7c30c&hash=BE3D697321FF61F4FA464719F032B8CE)
[ AI Agents and the Transformation of the Financial Industry](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/insight/tl-aiagents-financial-industry-20250418)
![Abstract purple and blue ribbons](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/insight/tl-aiagents-financial-industry-20250418/kv-ai-agent-innovates-20250418-936x578.png?rev=da58fc29230f4043b2691ca9467e64c8&hash=3ACEF48C2D408959BC7B1574E942502F)
[ Forefront of Banks' Digital Transformation: Generative AI Value Creation](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2024-10-08/01/)
![Man working on a laptop](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/redirects/corporate-blog/corporate-blog_global_fujitsu_com_fgb_2024-10-08_01-936x578.jpg?rev=02a77089d36945699c0480a22c8fe979&hash=1469982EEE227EE7E278785AD53E358C)
## Customer stories
![A woman working on her computer](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/industries/finance/cs-mtf-finance-20241018-809x500.jpg?h=500&iar=0&w=809&rev=15fd0849c210407e9570efa4c4c6edaa&hash=663FAD70656E19A56AAB4C6A46E3D1CB)
Faster data for better business decisions
Fujitsu’s Azure Databricks Standard Lakehouse Accelerator revitalised MTF Finance’s data landscape, empowering the MTF team with near real time analytics, secure user information handling, and accessible insights for data-driven decision making in the competitive financing market.
[ Read the data-driven success story ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories/cs-mtf-finance-20241018)
[ Fighting money laundering and fraud in financial services through AI](https://corporate-blog.global.fujitsu.com/fgb/2022-05-24/01)
New technologies for Financial field to detect and prevent fraudulent activities to ensure future sustainable growth.
![Hand interacting with data on a futuristic display](https://global.fujitsu/-/media/Project/Fujitsu/Fujitsu-HQ/industries/finance/interactive-analytics-on-digital-screens.jpg?rev=71476e97f94e4ba0844c4fe9821e7280&hash=8029614C92385B13CCB5E0DC3AACE1FD)
[ Finance customer stories ](https://global.fujitsu/en-global/customer-stories?tags=Financial%20Services)

The financial sector is entering a new era shaped by digital competition, shifting markets, and new AI‑driven expectations. Fujitsu supports this evolution with human‑centric digital transformation that enhances today’s operations and builds smarter, future‑ready customer experiences.

We accelerate digital transformation for financial institutions by applying cloud modernization, data‑driven insights, and innovative digital technologies. These initiatives help organizations streamline operations, improve customer experiences, and build new digital‑first business models.
